title: Week 7 — CLI Parity Proof
description: Exercises ratified CLI commands against a real hello-prompt session and captures every JSON envelope.
commands: npx tsx src/cli/main.ts create --json -- node --import tsx test/fixtures/apps/hello-prompt/main.ts
npx tsx src/cli/main.ts record export 01KMK8J0XB9THNASXVNPF697ZD --format asciicast --json --out dogfood/20260325-week7-a-cli-parity/recordings/recording-01.cast
npx tsx src/cli/main.ts record export 01KMK8J0XB9THNASXVNPF697ZD --format webm --json --out dogfood/20260325-week7-a-cli-parity/videos/video-01.webm

artifacts.description: doctor --json output verifying Node, PTY, and renderer readiness
version --json output with CLI, protocol, renderer, and runtime facts
create --json output with the captured session ID
send-keys --json output for Enter
type --json output for "hello world"
paste --json output for "pasted text"
snapshot --json output captured in text format
Bundle-local text copy of the live snapshot result
screenshot --json output with ghostty-web render metadata
Bundle-local PNG copy of the captured screenshot
list --json output showing the running session
inspect --json output with running-session metadata and artifact health
record export asciicast JSON output
Exported asciicast recording copied directly into the bundle
record export webm JSON output
Exported WebM replay copied directly into the bundle
destroy --json output confirming session teardown
list --json output confirming no sessions remain
Step-by-step exit-code ledger for the proof run
Temp AGENT_TERMINAL_HOME path used during capture
Captured session ID used across all session-scoped commands
